case_title: PETER KARABATOS ET AL VS. DANIELLE LANE, M.D. INC. A PROFESSIONAL CORP. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PETER KARABATOS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KARABATOS, PETER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $59.00- SERVED JUN-26-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LANE MD, DANIELLE A NATURAL PERSON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $69.00 - SERVED JUN-26-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE, M.D. INC.  A PROFESSIONAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-01-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506..PLAINTIFFS, PETER KARABATOS AND REBECCA KARABATOS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE, M.D. INC., A PROFESSIONAL CORP., REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE LANE IS PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. THE FOLLOWING EVIDENCE IS TO BE PRESENTED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE: 1. CLINIC BREAKDOWN OF CODES AND COSTS; 2. EVIDENCE CLINIC AGREED TO BILL PLAINTIFFS AT INSURANCE RATES; 3. PROCEDURES PERFORMED THAT DEFENDANT COULD HAVE BEEN REIMBURSED FOR BY INSURANCE, BUT CHOSE NOT TO AND ATTRIBUTED COST TO PLAINTIFF; AND 4. WHEN THE EMBRYO TRANSFER WAS PERFORMED OUT OF THE DEFENDANT'S CLINIC, AFTER THE SEPARATION EMAIL. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF PETER AND REBECCA KARABATOS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE M.D AS A NATURAL PERSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE M.D AS PROFESSIONAL CORP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE LANE M.D. INITIALLY CONTINUED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, NOW ON FOR PROGRESS REPORT. PARTIES ARE TO CONFER AS TO WHETHER THE COURT'S TENTATIVE IS TO BE A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OR TO GO FORWARD WITH AN ISSUED JUDGMENT. PARTIES MUST CONFIRM BEFORE THE END OF BUSINESS DAY ON MAR-08-2021. IF NO CONFIRMATION, TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED ON MAR-16-2021 AT 1:30PM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO EMAIL CORRESPONDENCE BY PLAINTIFFS PETER AND REBECCA KARABATOS RECEIVED ON MARCH 8, 2021. (CORRESPONDENCE PLACED IN CASE FILE)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KARABATOS, PETER KARABATOS, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE, M.D. INC.  A PROFESSIONAL CORP. LANE MD, DANIELLE A NATURAL PERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
